title: Single-statement members should use an expression body
messageFormat: Convert this member to an expression-bodied member.
summary: A method or accessor whose block contains a single return or expression statement carries three lines of braces around one line of work. An expression body states the same logic with =>, reducing the visual weight and making the one-liner read as the simple mapping it is.
compliant: public int Square(int value) => value * value;
